name: blocks-deployment
description: CI/CD build management, VCS repository configuration, and GitHub integration for SELISE Blocks — via the CloudBuild v1 API.

fieldConventions.repoId: Use repoId (not repositoryId) in request body
fieldConventions.projectKey: lowercase in body, PascalCase in query params
fieldConventions.buildId: Top-level in BuildResponse (not nested in data)
